description: Style Note Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design and the DRI-FIT technology to keep you sweat-free and fresh all day. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets superior style. Product Details Navy blue shorts, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, contrast panel on the side seams, attached inner brief, brand logo on the left leg Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on print/decoration
